assertions: the normal allocation-failure fixture exits successfully
the injected route-finder leak exits with code 3
the injected route-finder leak emits the exact required diagnostic
limitations: The fixture replaces C++ new/delete in the module-static test process; it does not cover every C allocator or a separately loaded root shared library.
The injected allocation is deliberately reclaimed after the live-allocation mismatch is observed.
Windows sanitizer instrumentation was not applied.
